description: Awesomize.ai offers AI media-generation apps on the web, including tools for turning prompts or chats into videos and comics. Its public developer-facing integration surface appears to be a small set of app-specific MCP servers hosted on awesomize.ai subdomains.
summary: Awesomize.ai exposes three OAuth-protected MCP servers: TalkGen, MangaBoom, and Apixel (served from bananagen.awesomize.ai); no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLI were found.
